title: Looping World
description: A Fabric mod that turns the world border into seamless wrap-around teleportation instead of a wall.
body:
Looping World mod takes the hard edges off the world border.
Step too far, and you’ll be teleported to the opposite side of the map, creating a seamless, looping world.

It teleports the player by calculating their position relative to the world border and mirroring it to the opposite side:
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65c5e30d3b287dccd548d260d698920476afe3a4.png)

It always finds a safe spot, prevents fall damage, and avoids dangerous blocks. Works completely server-side and fits any existing world — just enable the world border.

Perfect for small maps, survival challenges, adventure maps, or experimenting with new world designs.

**Note:** In the Nether, players are teleported to the roof, so make sure you have a way to get back down.
